title: pteris pseudocaudata
intro: Pteris pseudocaudata, also known as the False Caudate Brake, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pteris pseudocaudata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are used in traditional herbal preparations to create teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
